title: Build configuration
description: Schema for the SMPTE HTML publication tooling build configuration file

latestEditionTag.description: Optional override for the redline base. When set, the build uses this git commit or tag when generating redlines against the latest edition. When unset or null, the build auto-derives the redline base from the most recent matching git tag (most recent prior `-pub` tag when the document's pubStage is PUB; otherwise the most recent prior dated tag of any stage).
